name: Collect Mania
short_description: Search, collect and sort all kinds of beautiful things in the ever-popular clutter and hidden object games!
detailed_description:
Search, collect and sort all kinds of beautiful things in the ever-popular clutter and hidden object games!

Play your way through entertaining games on different themes, such as underwater, flowers, sweets and more.

Discover a multitude of charming and varied levels.
Find differences, color pictures, solve puzzles and search for many hidden objects!

Some highlights at a glance:

  • Enjoy lots of exciting clutter, puzzles and hidden object games

  • Play through different themes

  • Experience hours of challenging entertainment

  • Earn special trophies

  • Play a variety of mini-games such as Mahjongg, Solitaire, Match-3, Puzzle and more

  • Help for every game variant
